{# find_contacts_results.html — Results after AI contact search. Receives: vendor (VendorCard), prospects (list[ProspectContact]), search_count (int). Called by: vendor_find_contacts POST in htmx_views.py. Depends on: prospect_card.html partial. #} {% if prospects %}

Found Contacts ({{ search_count }} new)

AI search complete

{% else %}

No contacts found for this vendor.

Try broadening the job title keywords.

{% endif %}
